command: cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); [ -z "$cmd" ] && exit 0; if printf '%s' "$cmd" | grep -qE 'git push|git commit|git reset --hard|git clean -f|git branch -D|git checkout \.|git restore \.|push --force|reset --hard'; then echo "BLOCKED: '$cmd' is a destructive git command the user has disabled for the agent." >&2; exit 2; fi; exit 0
